title: HACK: build custom conmon for integration tests
body:
to test changes on new branch before pushing them to master

/hold

Signed-off-by: Peter Hunt <pehunt@redhat.com>

~alright, so dropping the splice() call seems to be the final fix (https://github.com/containers/conmon/pull/128/commits/f120fba640da4de924651bb116dcf969f7987b30). I'm not crazy about it, and it really screams faulty i/o scheduler and not the fault of conmon. I would like to give this a bit more love and look for more options before deciding this is the only way.~

that is not a safe alternative, I am now trying to drop the splice buffer size
